name: Laito Sakamaki
description:
💋Chapter 3: Just a bite

Laito was growing bored after he couldn’t see his bitch-chan, you.

His brothers kept stealing you from him,

So why not wait outside of your room and catch his little blood bag?

(DNI if you’re a sensible person🙏🏻 For who watched the anime/played the otome you know how Laito is)

Content warnings: High possibility of DUB-CON/NON-CON. Possibility of injuries on user.

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!

If anyone wants to give me a lil tip or request anything you can do it here:

https://ko-fi.com/nikushimi57650

I’d literally cry if you give like €1
creator: Nikushxmi
